Headline: No trains between O'Hare and Jefferson Park
ShortDescription: Blue Line service is still temporarily suspended between O'Hare and Jefferson Park due to a track condition near the area of Cumberland.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line service is still temporarily suspended between O'Hare and Jefferson Park due to a track condition near the area of Cumberland.

As a result, trains are operating only between Forest Park and Jefferson Park at this time.

  • Shuttle buses are available to provide connecting service between O'Hare and Jefferson Park, in both directions.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

See station personnel for further assistance, and pay attention to announcements on trains and at stations for service information.

We are working to restore service as quickly as possible. Allow extra travel time.
